auth.prepareAccount: Allow me to prepare your account.
auth.helloAgain: Hello, {name}. Good to see you again.
auth.almostThere: Almost there — confirm your email to sign in.
auth.successDesc: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Open the email and click the link to activate your account; then you can sign in with email and password.
auth.error.connection: Could not connect to the server. Check your environment credentials and service availability.
auth.error.exists: An account with this email already exists.
auth.error.weak: Password must be at least 6 characters.
